title: Dagannoth mother
wikitext:
{{External|rs=Dagannoth mother (Horror from the Deep)}} {{Otheruses|the quest boss fought during [[Horror from the Deep]]|the [[Nightmare Zone]] variant|Dagannoth mother (Nightmare Zone)}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Dagannoth mother |image = [[File:Dagannoth mother white.png|200px]] |release = [[17 November]] [[2004]] |update = Horror From The Deep |members = Yes |combat = 100 |size = 3 |examine = A horror from the ocean depths... |xpbonus = 5 |max hit = 9 ([[Melee]]), 12×2 ([[Ranged]]) |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Melee]], [[Ranged]] |attack speed = 4 |slayxp = 126 |cat = Dagannoth |assignedby = vannaka,chaeldar,konar,nieve,duradel |hitpoints = 120 |att = 78 |str = 78 |def = 81 |mage = 1 |range = 50 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 150 |dslash = 150 |dcrush = 150 |dmagic = 50 |drange = 50 |elementalweaknesstype = Earth |elementalweaknesspercent = 35 |immunepoison = No |immunevenom = No |id = 980,981,982,983,984,985,986,987,988 }} The '''Dagannoth mother''' is fought at the end of the quest [[Horror from the Deep]]. She cycles through different colours every 18 seconds to explicitly show her weaknesses. While fighting the Dagannoth Mother, it is possible to hide or [[safespot]] behind the nearby stalagmites. [[Protect from Missiles]] is advised as her Ranged attack is highly accurate. She can hit up to 9s with [[Melee]], and can hit double 12s with [[Ranged]]. [[Combat pure|Pures]] are advised to bring a [[ring of recoil]] and turn off [[auto-retaliate]] if not using melee. '''Note:''' The [[twinflame staff]] cannot be effectively used against her, as even when trying to cast other elemental spells, it will default to casting earth spells due to the Dagannoth mother's elemental weakness to earth. Once she is defeated, you will obtain a rusty casket. She can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete. Runes are provided in the arena. ==Weakness by colour== {|class="wikitable" !Image !Colour !Weakness !Attack Using |- |[[File:Dagannoth mother white.png|40px]] |White |[[Air spells]] |[[Wind Strike]], [[Wind Bolt|Bolt]], [[Wind Blast|Blast]], [[Wind Wave|Wave]], or [[Wind Surge|Surge]]. |- |[[File:Dagannoth mother blue.png|40px]] |Blue |[[Water spells]] |[[Water Strike]], [[Water Bolt|Bolt]], [[Water Blast|Blast]], [[Water Wave|Wave]], or [[Water Surge|Surge]]. |- |[[File:Dagannoth mother orange.png|40px]] |Orange |Melee |[[Melee]] attacks. |- |[[File:Dagannoth mother brown.png|40px]] |Brown |[[Earth spells]] |[[Earth Strike]], [[Earth Bolt|Bolt]], [[Earth Blast|Blast]], [[Earth Wave|Wave]], or [[Earth Surge|Surge]]. |- |[[File:Dagannoth mother red.png|40px]] |Red |[[Fire spells]] |[[Fire Strike]], [[Fire Bolt|Bolt]], [[Fire Blast|Blast]], [[Fire Wave|Wave]], or [[Fire Surge|Surge]]. |- |[[File:Dagannoth mother green.png|40px]] |Green |Ranged |[[Ranged]] attacks. |} ==Drops== ===100%=== {{DropsTableHead|leagueRegion=No}} {{DropsLine|name=Bones|quantity=1|rarity=Always}} {{DropsLine|name=Rusty casket|quantity=1|rarity=Always}} {{DropsTableBottom}} ==Dialogue== {{Hastranscript|npc}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 25 June 2025 |update = Summer Sweep Up: Combat |change = The Dagannoth mother now has a 35% elemental weakness to [[earth spells]]. }} {{Subject changes |date = 31 July 2006 |update = Crossbows |change = The Dagannoth mother's orange form was recoloured. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Dagannoth mother (orange) (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Dagannoth mother orange.png|center|300x150px]] |- |17 November 2004 –
